insight: Death commands using `~` relative coordinates fail when the boss dies without a player (Wither effect, fall damage, etc.) because console has no position context. Fix: use `{boss_x}`, `{boss_y}`, `{boss_z}` variables which always resolve from the entity's location. Users commonly guess `{boss_location_x}` — the correct names are `{boss_x}`, `{boss_y}`, `{boss_z}`.

Boss variables like `{boss_x}`, `{boss_name}` are only replaced when commands run through the console path (`Console: true` or no killer). Non-console player commands (`Console: false` with a killer) skip `replaceVariablesLegacy()` entirely, so Boss variables stay as literal text.
